thinking:

Batch 1: Core config files (globals.css, layout.tsx, types, lib)
Batch 2: Context + Supabase + middleware
Batch 3: Storefront components
Batch 4: Cart components + Dashboard components
Batch 5: Pages (app/page.tsx, auth, dashboard)

Let me write them all now. I'll use the file-writer subagent for multiple batches.

Let me write very detailed file content for each subagent.
